data.title: Ethereum Treasury Firm SharpLink Gaming Adds BlackRock Veteran As Co-CEO
data.description:
SharpLink Gaming Ltd, a leading corporate Ethereum (ETH) holder has announced Joseph Chalom as its new Co-Chief Executive Officer (CEO). As a former senior executive at BlackRock, Chalam brings institutional leadership expertise to SharpLink. SharpLink Moving Forward in the Digital Asset Space Ethereum co-founder Joseph Lubin has expressed excitement about Chalom’s new position
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/26/ethereum-treasury-firm-sharplink-gaming-adds-blackrock-veteran-as-co-ceo/

data.title: Altman warns of privacy issues while using ChatGPT for certain purposes
data.description:
Anyone seeking counseling or personal advice from ChatGPT should be cautious, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman warns, because conversations with the AI don’t carry the same privacy safeguards as those with a real doctor or lawyer. Altman raised the issue on a recent episode of comedian Theo Von’s podcast. He noted that as AI moves into more sensitive […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sam-altman-warns-privacy-chatgpt/

data.title: Tron Network Turbocharging USDT Payments, Can TRX Price Rebound?
data.description:

data.title: What Happens to Bitcoin After All 21 Million Are Mined?
data.description:
Once all 21 million bitcoins are mined by the year 2140, the Bitcoin network will continue to function, with miners relying solely on transaction fees instead of block rewards.

The post What Happens to Bitcoin After All 21 Million Are Mined? first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/07/26/what-happens-when-21-m-bitcoin-mined/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=what-happens-when-21-m-bitcoin-mined

data.title: Ethereum ETFs Steal the Spotlight from Bitcoin
data.description:
The recent surge in interest surrounding Ethereum exchange-traded funds (ETFs) has drawn significant attention away from Bitcoin, as investors and analysts alike are increasingly captivated by the potential of Ethereum's innovative technology and its diverse range of applications within the blockchain ecosystem. With more funds entering the market and Ethereum's unique capabilities becoming more widely recognized, it appears that these new financial products centered on Ethereum are commanding more headlines and discussions in the cryptocurrency space, effectively overshadowing Bitcoin's longstanding dominance. This shift in focus highlights the evolving landscape of digital assets, as investors are eager to explore alternative opportunities that promise not only potential returns but also advancements in decentralized finance, smart contracts, and non-fungible tokens (NFTs) associated with the Ethereum network.
source: https://blocknews.com/ethereum-etfs-steal-the-spotlight-from-bitcoin/

data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Increases by $500 Million in Recent Week
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 4.8 billion USDC and redeemed around 4.3 billion USDC in the week ending July 24, resulting in a net increase of 500 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 65 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately $65.2 billion. This reserve includes about $8.9 billion in cash and $56.3 billion held in the Circle Reserve Fund.

data.title: El Salvador’s Bitcoin strategy shifts focus to government holdings as IMF deal limits public adoption
data.description:
26-7-2025 – El Salvador’s Bitcoin experiment has evolved into a government accumulation strategy with minimal impact on ordinary citizens, according to analysis from Bitcoin education advocates, as reported by Cointelegraph. Quentin Ehrenmann, general manager at NGO My First Bitcoin, told Reuters that the country’s IMF loan agreement has effectively ended Bitcoin’s legal tender status and [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/el-salvadors-bitcoin-strategy-shifts-focus-to-government-holdings-as-imf-deal-limits-public-adoption/
